_meta.description: ARIA — Deliberation Questions. Single source of truth. Merged aria_questions.json + ministers.json (deduplicated).

structure.by_ministry: Questions indexed by ARIA ministry — direct routing
structure.transversal_pool: Questions without assigned ministry — routing via keywords or AI

usage.board_game: Local routing via keywords (field 'keywords' in base_agents.json)
usage.ia_mode: Automatic routing by AI based on question content
usage.duplicate_filter: Check against chronolog before proposing an already debated question

quotidien.description: Everyday tensions — close to the citizen experience, often economic or social
questions: The price of bread has risen by 15% this week, what response should we provide?
Hospital waiting times are increasing, should we urgently hire more staff?
Our rail infrastructure is collapsing, should we privatize it?
Youth unemployment is stagnating, what is our strategy?
Pension reform is triggering strikes, should we back down?
Fuel prices are crushing rural households, what direct support should we provide?
Urban waste management is becoming a public health crisis.
The education system lacks teachers, should we lower requirements?
City-center rents are unaffordable, should we cap them?
Public debt has reached record levels, should we raise taxes?
Farmers are requesting emergency aid due to drought.
Public transport safety is rapidly declining.
Internet networks are saturated in underserved areas.
Back-to-school costs are becoming a burden for families.
City-center businesses are closing one after another.
Noise pollution in major cities is becoming unbearable.
The healthcare system is overwhelmed this winter.
Water management is becoming a source of conflict in the south.
Artisans are demanding lower social charges.
Civil servant morale is at an all-time low, what should we announce?
Administrative delays are exploding, should we massively automate public services?
Emergency services are overwhelmed every weekend, what immediate action should we take?
Power outages are becoming frequent, should we introduce rationing?
Should public space surveillance cameras be equipped with facial recognition?
Should noisy pets be banned in urban areas?
Should all shops be open 24/7?
Should paper mail be replaced by mandatory digital-only communication?
Should public transport be 100% free?
Should smoking in all public spaces, including outdoors, be banned?
Should we limit the time spent on social media per citizen?
Should working from home be a mandatory right for all desk jobs?
Should street lighting be turned off at night to save energy?
Should local urban gardens replace parking lots?
Should a 'civility tax' be created for antisocial behavior?
Should micro-donations to the State be automated at every purchase?

crise_et_peur.description: Urgent crises, social fear, extreme situations — maximum pressure on the Council
questions: A wave of coordinated terrorist attacks is suspected, should we declare a state of siege?
Rumors of a pandemic are spreading, should we impose a preventive lockdown?
A neighboring country is massing troops at the border.
A cyberattack shut down the banking network for 6 hours.
Gas reserves are at 10%, how do we get through winter?
Riots erupt in suburbs following alleged police misconduct.
The national power grid risks total blackout tonight.
A toxic leak in a chemical plant threatens an entire city.
Separatist movements have taken control of a province.
The national currency is collapsing on international markets.
Healthcare workers threaten mass resignation.
A series of suspicious plane crashes alarms civil aviation.
Managing climate refugees is becoming unmanageable at the border.
The Interior Ministry reports a rise in insurrection.
Media announce an imminent nuclear threat.
The judicial system is paralyzed by a general strike.
A famine threatens after crops are destroyed by insects.
Police report a surge in organized crime.
A diplomatic crisis emerges with our main trade partner.
The country faces a foreign ultimatum.
An unknown virus is spreading rapidly with no known treatment.
An AI has escaped control within critical infrastructure.
A global internet outage plunges the country into chaos.
Should we impose a total curfew following recent riots?
Should foreign travelers be quarantined systematically?
Should suspicious bank accounts be frozen without a warrant?
Should we cut off the national internet to prevent a cyber-attack?
Should the State requisition private homes to house refugees?
Should masks and gloves be mandatory in the metro for life?
Should we authorize the torture of suspects to prevent an imminent attack?
Should panic-mongering on social media be criminalized?
Should food be rationed to prevent shortages?
Should the army take control of hospitals in case of an outbreak?
Should the State be allowed to read private messages during 'red' alerts?
Should dissenters be exiled to remote zones during a crisis?

ideologique.description: Fundamental questions — values, philosophical tensions, societal choices
questions: Should we restrict freedom of speech to preserve order?
Should secularism be reinterpreted to improve integration?
Should we prioritize economic growth or environmental protection?
Should voting rights be conditioned on tax contribution?
Should we adopt a policy of total self-sufficiency?
Should we censor media that criticize the government?
Should AI be granted rights as a thinking entity?
Is nationalism the only answer to globalization?
Should religion have a place in state debates?
Should social benefits be removed to encourage work?
Should the government intervene in citizens' private lives?
Should we prioritize local citizens over foreigners?
Is direct democracy preferable to representative democracy?
Should some freedoms be sacrificed for total security?
Should the education system indoctrinate state values?
Is meritocracy an illusion or a goal?
Should wealth be capped by law?
Should radical political movements be banned?
Should national culture be protected from foreign influence?
Is technological progress necessarily beneficial to the people?
Should collective happiness take precedence over individual freedoms?
Should social media be strictly regulated to preserve social cohesion?
Should truth be defined by the State in times of crisis?
Is individual freedom more important than collective security?
Should the concept of 'Nationality' be replaced by a 'Global Citizen' status?
Should we ban all religions to promote state secularism?
Is the State always right, even when it makes mistakes?
Should we strive for total equality, even if it stifles ambition?
Should meritocracy replace democracy?
Should our culture be protected against any foreign influence?
Should humans be augmented with machines to stay competitive?
Should we allow the creation of private micronations within our territory?
Is a 'benevolent dictatorship' better than a 'failing democracy'?
Should the State define what is 'Moral' and what is not?
Should we forgive past crimes in the name of national unity?

anomalie_et_scifi.description: Impossible events, reality breaks — Chance/Destiny mode or sandbox sessions
questions: A coded radio signal is received from Alpha Centauri, how do we respond?
Unidentified objects are hovering over 12 world capitals.
An entire city has vanished overnight.
Citizens report sightings of blue humanoids.
Gravity has been nullified within a 5 km radius of a power plant.
An infinite energy source has been discovered beneath Antarctica.
Time stopped for one second across the entire country.
Animals have started speaking, how do we handle this?
A space-time portal has opened in the desert.
Satellites detect massive constructions beneath the oceans.
Citizens begin developing telepathic abilities.
The Moon has abruptly changed trajectory.
Plants are growing instantly across the territory.
Machines have begun expressing human emotions.
A computer virus is turning citizens’ language into binary.
The dead appear to be coming back to life in a hospital.
The sky has turned completely black in broad daylight.
Signals from our future are being intercepted by our radios.
Mythological creatures have been spotted in forests.
Citizens’ dreams have become synchronized nationwide.
An exact duplicate of every citizen suddenly appears.
Time begins to flow differently depending on the region.
An extraterrestrial intelligence proposes an immediate technological alliance.
